stories.headline: EPA proposes repealing limits on four types of forever chemicals in drinking water
stories.body:
Breaking news: The EPA proposed repealing limits on four types of “forever chemicals” in drinking water.

The proposal would end the Biden-era restrictions on four PFAS compounds and give utilities more time to comply with limits on two others. https://www.washingtonpost.com/climate-environment/2026/05/18/epa-wants-repeal-limits-forever-chemicals-drinking-water/?utm_campaign=wp_main&utm_source=twitter&utm_medium=social

stories.headline: The Rock and Joe Rogan on political friends
stories.body:
The Rock: "I have friends who support Trump. I have friends who support Biden."

Joe Rogan: "Do you really have friends who support Biden?"

The Rock: "No, no, no, no… Thank you. This is important context. They support the Democratic Party."

stories.headline: Joe Rogan expresses worry about Theo Von's well-being after a Netflix taping.
stories.body:
Joe Rogan Says He’s Worried About Theo Von

Joe: "Theo had a Netflix taping and it didn't go well... I think he just had a kind of a breakdown and then said 'I'm just trying not to take my own life.' And I'm like, oh Jesus Christ, like I gotta help this dude."

Theo: "This is mostly cap. Sad to see this kinda stuff. Im doing great."

"Joe actually cares about Theo and his well-being. I think people, you know, blew it up, a lot more than what it is."

stories.headline: Obsession becomes cheapest movie to top American box office this century
stories.body:
OBSESSION has officially become the cheapest movie to EVER top the American box office this century. 

Costing only $750K to be made, it earned $2.9M this Monday, surpassing both MICHAEL ($2.7M) and DEVIL WEARS PRADA ($2.0M).

Flames ripping through the area northwest of L.A. 500 firefighters battling it as residents flee in terror: “Whole area was in flames… smoke everywhere.”

Super dry conditions + years of Democrat incompetence = annual disaster.

California’s radical green policies, zero forest management, and “let nature burn” insanity have turned the state into a tinderbox every single year.

Newsom collects the highest taxes in America and still can’t stop the state from catching fire.

Prayers up for the brave firefighters and the families forced to evacuate.
